subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents brought joy and delight [3.5s]... ...There is no truth whatsoever to the inferences of the astrologers… The other sign that is mentioned in the Tablets is the hidden craft.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون بهجت و سرور حاصل گردید جناب حاجی
subcodes.subjects: @astrology and numerology, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
